title: Modern Inhibited
description: Inhibits player abilities through one simple effect.
body:
## Modern Inhibited
This is a 1.16.5+ port of [Inhibited](https://modrinth.com/mod/inhibited).

## Difference

- you can customize the effect particle rendering.
- you can define structure registry names in the config, and then the effect will be applied to players who are in the structures.
## Found your items unusable when the effect presents?
Check out [Adventurable Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adventurable-items)
## Misc
